title: write_smt2 behavior with multiple clock domains

features.name: multiple independent clock domains in always blocks
features.description: Code should include two separate always @(posedge clk) blocks with different clock signals, each driving a separate register
features.snippet:
always @(posedge clk1) count1 <= count1 + 1'b1;
always @(posedge clk2) count2 <= count2 + 1'b1;
